---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Command run

```bash
nginxpm <command> [flags]
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Architecture: [e.g. amd64, arm64]
- CLI version: `nginxpm version`
- Nginx Proxy Manager version: [e.g. 2.11.3]

## Additional context

Any other context, config, or screenshots.
